keymaps.name: Mike's Layout
keymaps.description:
Mod -> Right spacebar (actual mod layer)
Fn2 -> Left Mod key (actually a fn2 layer)
Fn3 -> Semicolon mode

keymaps.name: Normal
keymaps.description: QWERTY is the mother of all layouts. This is the Mac version.

keymaps.name: Vim Mode
keymaps.description: This is an empty keymap. Let's start from scratch!

keymaps.name: Vim Mode OLD
keymaps.description: This is an empty keymap. Let's start from scratch!

macroActions.command:
ifPrimary advancedStrategy final tapKey c
holdKey CSAG-c

macros.name: [dual] LCommand and "If Exists Trigger Action Menu"

macroActions.command:
ifSecondary simpleStrategy final holdKey iLG
tapKey CG-f13

ifGui final holdKey v
ifPrimary advancedStrategy final tapKey v
holdKey CSAG-x

ifPrimary advancedStrategy final holdKey semicolonAndColon
holdLayer fn3

ifShift tapKey LCSG-minusAndUnderscore
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-minusAndUnderscore

ifShift tapKey LCSG-commaAndLessThanSign
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-commaAndLessThanSign

ifShift tapKey LCSG-dotAndGreaterThanSign
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-dotAndGreaterThanSign

ifShift tapKey LCSG-slashAndQuestionMark
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-slashAndQuestionMark

ifShift tapKey LCSG-0
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-0

ifShift tapKey LCSG-1
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-1

ifShift tapKey LCSG-2
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-2

ifShift tapKey LCSG-3
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-3

ifShift tapKey LCSG-4
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-4

ifShift tapKey LCSG-5
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-5

ifShift tapKey LCSG-6
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-6

ifShift tapKey LCSG-7
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-7

ifShift tapKey LCSG-8
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-8

ifShift tapKey LCSG-9
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-9

ifShift tapKey LCSG-h
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-h

ifShift tapKey LG-closingBracketAndClosingBrace
ifNotShift tapKey LSG-closingBracketAndClosingBrace

ifShift tapKey LCSG-j
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-j

ifShift tapKey LCSG-k
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-k

ifShift tapKey LCSG-l
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-l

ifShift tapKey LCSG-m
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-m
holdLayer fn2

ifShift tapKey LCSG-n
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-n

ifShift tapKey LCSG-o
ifNotShift tapKey LCG-o

ifShift tapKey LG-openingBracketAndOpeningBrace
ifNotShift tapKey LSG-openingBracketAndOpeningBrace

ifNotInterrupted pressKey LC-
tapKey tab
delayUntilRelease

ifShift tapKey LCS-equalAndPlus
ifNotShift tapKey LCSG-equalAndPlus

ifShortcut anyOrder semicolonAndColon a final tapKey LG-c
holdKey l

ifShortcut anyOrder l a final tapKey LG-c
holdKey semicolonAndColon

macros.name: [shortcut] Double tap q when holding down command to quit

macroActions.command:
ifGui ifDoubletap final tapKey q
ifGui final noOp
holdKey q

macros.name: [shortcut] Super key when held and activate VIM key layout when pressed

macroActions.command:
ifSecondary simpleStrategy final holdKey iLSACG
switchKeymap VIM
setVar count ($count * 10 + 0)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 1)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 2)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 3)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 4)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 5)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 6)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 7)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 8)
setVar count ($count * 10 + 9)

ifGesture timeoutIn 300 g final tapKey G-up
ifShift final tapKey G-down
holdKey g
suppressMods tapKey LSG-z

ifShift suppressMods final tapKey LSG-z
suppressMods tapKey LG-z
untoggleLayer
autoRepeat tapKey LSA-left
autoRepeat tapKey LS-down
autoRepeat tapKey LSA-right
autoRepeat tapKey LS-left

suppressMods tapKey LG-v
untoggleLayer
autoRepeat tapKey LS-right
autoRepeat tapKey LS-up
autoRepeat tapKeySeq LSA-right LS-right

tapKey backspace
untoggleLayer

suppressMods tapKey LG-c
untoggleLayer
ifPrimary final tapKey `

macros.name: Go to UHK site in browser
Tap to Escape, Hold to Shift

macroActions.command:
ifPrimary final tapKey escape
holdLayer fn

macroActions.text:
Silent Bob
711-2880 Nulla St.
Mankato Mississippi 96522
